title: Wrong Number Series Practice Test - Complete 250 Questions
description: Find the wrong term in the following number series questions.
author: AASHISH ARORA

questions.explanation: –12 + 6 = –6 → –6 + 6 = 0 → 0 + 6 = 6 → 6 + 6 = 12 → 12 + 6 = 18 → 18 + 6 = 24 The wrong number is 2, which should be replaced with 0.

700 + 10 = 710 → 710 – 30 = 680 → 680 + 10 = 690 → 690 – 30 = 660 → 660 + 10 = 670 → 670 – 30 = 640 → The alternate addition of 10 and subtraction of 30 is followed in the → given pattern. The wrong number is 675, which should be replaced with 680.
